ipteunyeong.title: The Joy of Robot Vacuums
ipteunyeong.text: It's been a few months since I got a robot vacuum, and it has completely transformed my daily routine. At first, I thought of it as just another appliance, but now it feels like a beloved companion that has improved my quality of life significantly. While I'm getting ready for work on busy mornings, it cleans every corner of the house all on its own. When I come home from work and see the spotless floors without a speck of dust, it seems to melt away my fatigue and stress instantly. It's especially helpful when I have guests over on weekends - having the place cleaned in advance makes entertaining so much easier. I even find it endearing watching it work so hard while dodging obstacles like furniture and toys. The robot vacuum has freed me from the stress of cleaning, allowing me to focus on other important things or simply relax. My little cleaning companion has truly given me the gift of time and breathing room in my hectic life.
ipteunyeong.korean_summary: 로봇 청소기를 사용한 지 몇 달이 지났는데, 단순한 가전제품이 아닌 삶의 질을 향상시켜주는 소중한 동반자가 되었습니다. 바쁜 아침에 출근 준비를 하는 동안 혼자서 집 구석구석을 청소해주고, 퇴근 후 깨끗한 바닥을 보면 하루의 피로가 사라집니다. 청소 스트레스에서 해방되어 더 중요한 일에 집중하거나 휴식을 취할 수 있게 되었습니다.

gwitunyeong.title: Global Stock Rally Faces Growing Risk of Market Correction
gwitunyeong.text: Global equities entered 2026 after a powerful rally, but veteran investors warn the advance may be fragile. Strong gains in 2025 and early 2026 have pushed valuations higher, while months without meaningful pullbacks have reduced buffers against potential shocks. Strategists at Goldman Sachs argue that markets are historically overdue for correction, suggesting that geopolitical tensions, policy shifts, or earnings disappointments could abruptly change market sentiment. High-profile analysts caution that stretched valuations and frothy optimism may magnify downside risks when a catalyst appears. Additional concerns include market complacency, narrowing leadership among stocks, and heavy reliance on megacap technology shares. Any stumble among market leaders, particularly regarding AI spending durability, could amplify volatility during the next market adjustment phase.
gwitunyeong.korean_summary: 2026년 글로벌 주식시장이 강력한 상승세를 보였지만, 베테랑 투자자들은 조정 위험이 커지고 있다고 경고하고 있습니다. 골드만삭스 전략가들은 시장이 역사적으로 조정 시기가 늦어지고 있으며, 지정학적 긴장이나 정책 변화가 시장 심리를 급변시킬 수 있다고 분석했습니다. 특히 AI 관련 지출의 지속성에 대한 우려와 대형 기술주 의존도가 높아 변동성이 증폭될 가능성이 있습니다.

key_expressions.example: I used to think of it as just a simple task, but now I realize its importance.
Working from home has significantly improved my quality of life.
All my worries seemed to melt away when I heard the good news.
This new system will free us from repetitive manual work.
The company is overdue for a major restructuring.
The announcement could abruptly change investor sentiment.
High leverage can magnify risks during market downturns.
Algorithmic trading can amplify volatility during uncertain times.

today_sentences.english: The quarterly earnings report could abruptly change market sentiment if it falls short of expectations.
today_sentences.korean: 분기 실적 보고서가 예상에 미치지 못하면 시장 심리를 갑작스럽게 바꿀 수 있습니다.
today_sentences.grammar_point: 조건절(if)과 가정법 현재 - 현재나 미래의 가능한 상황을 표현

today_sentences.english: We need to implement measures that will free our team from repetitive manual tasks.
today_sentences.korean: 우리 팀을 반복적인 수작업으로부터 해방시킬 조치들을 시행해야 합니다.
today_sentences.grammar_point: 관계대명사절 - that will ~로 명사를 수식하여 구체적 설명 제공

today_sentences.english: This robot vacuum has completely transformed my quality of life at home.
today_sentences.korean: 이 로봇청소기가 집에서의 삶의 질을 완전히 바꾸어 놓았습니다.
today_sentences.grammar_point: 현재완료시제 - has + 과거분사로 과거부터 현재까지 지속되는 영향 표현

quiz.korean: 이 새로운 시스템은 우리를 반복적인 업무로부터 해방시켜 줄 것입니다.
quiz.answer: This new system will free us from repetitive work.
The market is historically overdue for correction.
At first, I thought of it as just a simple appliance.

quiz.sentence: Strong gains have pushed _______ higher, creating vulnerability in the market.
quiz.korean: 강력한 상승세가 _______을 높여 시장에 취약성을 만들었습니다.

quiz.sentence: The robot vacuum has given me the gift of time and _______ in my busy life.
quiz.korean: 로봇청소기가 바쁜 삶에서 시간과 _______을 선물해 주었습니다.

quiz.sentence: Market _______ and heavy reliance on tech stocks could amplify risks.
quiz.korean: 시장의 _______과 기술주에 대한 높은 의존도가 위험을 증폭시킬 수 있습니다.
